audit_items.proof_trace: The only dynamically allocated pointer in hellocluster.c is `ids` in `ListCommand_RedisCommand`, obtained via `RedisModule_GetClusterNodesList` and freed via `RedisModule_FreeClusterNodesList(ids)` at L71. The immediately following statement (L72) is `return REDISMODULE_OK`; no access to `ids` or any derived pointer occurs after the free. No other function in the file performs any allocation or free, and no double-free exists.
